TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[623.960-669.430] interviewee: was a German Jewish youth organization. And all we did-- they taught the songs and a little history. On Sunday, we took trips or hikes. And already during the trips and hikes, I was always concerned about my next ones. When we went on a bicycle ride, I saw a girl or a boy stood behind could make it so fast, I went back and I helped them. I was always worried about other ones. I tried

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
about my next ones.
